    Description
    AvatarConfig
    Serializable avatar settings stored on user profiles.
    Event
    Event.java Model class representing an approved and active event in Firestore.
    EventAttendee
    EventAttendee.java Model class representing an attendee document under events/{eventId}/attendees/{userId}.
    EventProposal
    EventProposal.java Model class representing a proposal document from the event_proposals collection in Firestore.
    Memory
    Memory.java Model class representing a post-event memory saved by a user.
    Notification
    Notification.java Model class representing a user notification message.
    Payment
    Payment.java Model class representing a payment record in Firestore.
    Rsvp
    Rsvp.java Model class representing an RSVP document in Firestore.
    SosAlert
    Model class representing an SOS alert document in the sos_alerts Firestore collection.
    TicketTier
    TicketTier.java Model class representing a ticket tier in the ticket_tiers subcollection.
    User
    User.java Model class representing a user document from the Firestore users collection.g Aligned with the database design in /docs/db/initial_db.txt.
    VendorProposal
    VendorProposal.java Model for vendor requests submitted by organizers and reviewed by admins.
